title: AN ACT CONVERTING MARIPIPI COMPREHENSIVE NATIONAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIPIPI, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS MARIPIPI NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1121 / 67 OG No. 9, 1543 (March 1, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6162, November 09, 1970 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING MARIPIPI COMPREHENSIVE NATIONAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIPIPI, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS MARIPIPI NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Maripipi Comprehensive National School in the Municipality of Maripipi, Province of Leyte, is hereby converted into a national vocational school to be known as Maripipi National Vocational School:

Provided, however,

That only a general education curriculum with practical arts shall be offered in the first and years, and the vocational education curriculum shall be offered in the third and fourth years:

Provided, further,

That the school shall offer short vocational courses for raining in vocations needed in the locality which shall be open to elementary school graduates:

Provided, finally,

That the school .shall open, as soon as feasible, two-year post secondary technical courses.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, November 9, 1970.
